Heritage Collection

Our Heritage

A Lineage Forged
in Pure Gold

For three generations, the Verma family has poured their soul into every gram of gold they touch. What began as a single craftsman's dedication to perfection has grown into a legacy — a name trusted across families for their most sacred moments.

We do not merely make jewellery. We create heirlooms that carry your story forward, shaped by hands that have learned the language of gold long before machines ever could.

75+ Years of Legacy
500+ Families Adorned
22K Gold Standard
100% Hallmarked

The Art of Making

Crafted by Hand,
Kissed by Flame

— 01

Design Conception

Every piece begins as a sketch — a conversation between your vision and our master craftsman's inherited eye for proportion and beauty.

— 02

Gold Casting

Pure 22-karat gold is melted and poured with practiced precision. The flame reveals what the gold has always been — waiting to become something extraordinary.

— 03

Hand Finishing

Filing, polishing, engraving — each detail attended to by hand. No shortcut has ever touched a piece that carries our name.

— 04

BIS Hallmarking

Every piece is certified and hallmarked — a promise of purity you can see, touch, and trust across generations to come.

"My mother wore their necklace at her wedding. My daughter wore one at hers. Uday Jwellers does not make jewellery — they make memories that outlast lifetimes."

— Savitri Devi, Three-Generation Customer

Visit Our Atelier

Come, Let Us Adorn
Your Story

We welcome you to experience our craft in person. Every consultation is unhurried, every design discussion is sacred. This is not shopping — it is a rite of passage.
